notes.build: npx next build — exit 0, route '/' 9.09 kB / 142 kB First Load JS, 4/4 static pages generated
notes.scope: Infra only. No Core/Module geometry, no section timelines. Placeholder DemoCube in _Scene.tsx proves the R3F pipeline is wired; real scene graph lands in a later phase.

warnings: Club GSAP plugins (ScrollSmoother, SplitText, DrawSVGPlugin, MorphSVGPlugin, InertiaPlugin, ScrambleTextPlugin, Physics2DPlugin, PhysicsPropsPlugin, CustomBounce, CustomWiggle, GSDevTools) are dynamically imported at runtime. This installation of gsap (3.15.0 / gsap free npm package) ships bundled .js files for all of them, so they register successfully in this dev env. Without a Club license in a stricter registry environment these imports would fall through to console.warn and the Lenis fallback path in SmoothScrollProvider would activate.
SmoothScrollProvider will swap to Lenis + gsap.ticker bridge automatically if ScrollSmoother fails to resolve; no caller changes needed.
prefers-reduced-motion visitors get native scroll (no smoother) and the SvgCoreFallback in place of the R3F Canvas via useIsMobile.
